module_handover.change_summary: 1. Created core/utils.py with _compress_line_nos function (List[object] -> str) 2. Removed local _compress_line_nos from main.py; added from core.utils import _compress_line_nos inside _cli_main 3. Removed local _compress_line_nos from ui/app.py; added from core.utils import _compress_line_nos at module level Function signature and behavior identical to removed local definitions.

self_check.python39_syntax: PASS — List[object] typing from typing module; no 3.10+ syntax
self_check.type_hinting: PASS — _compress_line_nos(raw_nos: List[object]) -> str with full type annotations
self_check.error_handling: PASS — ValueError/TypeError handled with fallback join; empty list returns ""
self_check.path_safety: PASS — no path changes in this MT
self_check.al_edge_cases: PASS — empty list returns ""; ValueError/TypeError fallback; non-numeric items handled
self_check.docstring: PASS — docstring preserved from original with examples
